newsLog.text: MAJOR LEAGUE ALIGNMENT CORRECTION: DF's regular-season league is 'Section 1 Conference 3 - D League' — a 6-team division confirmed via MaxPreps standings pages for all teams. The 6 teams: Dobbs Ferry, Blind Brook, Hastings, Rye Neck, Tuckahoe, Leffell School. Previously assumed 8-team 'Class B league' including Briarcliff, Pawling, Putnam Valley, Valhalla — WRONG. Those teams are in separate leagues: Pawling/Haldane/Putnam Valley/North Salem are in Conference 3-E League. Westlake/Pleasantville/Byram Hills are in Conference 3-A League. Edgemont/Pelham/Bronxville are in Conference 2-D League. Valhalla/Briarcliff have no Conference 3-D games. Removed 5 non-Conference-3D games from divisionB array. Class B is the NYSPHSAA playoff enrollment class, NOT the regular-season league.
newsLog.source: MaxPreps standings pages (DF, BB, Hastings, Tuckahoe, Edgemont, Valhalla, Westlake, Pawling, Putnam Valley)

DF record 4-3 (V), 1-2 (JV). No schedule changes in Gmail. IG @dfeaglesbaseball confirms Apr 14 W 6-3 vs Ardsley with box scores (minor stat discrepancies vs GC noted). All teamIntel updated with current DS records and Up Next lines. CORRECTION: Section One Athletics checked — site is down (DNS/empty response across all URL variants). DFSD Athletics checked — calendar confirms Apr 14 Ardsley, Apr 16 JV at Hastings, Apr 18 V at Haldane. No schedule changes.

Gmail MCP unavailable (tool upgrade). MaxPreps returned leaderboard only, no detailed stats. Section One Athletics not checked (DNS issues persist).

newsLog.title: FULL daily sweep - all 15 DS teams checked via Chrome MCP
newsLog.details: Complete sweep of all 15 DigitalSports teams using correct DS IDs (fixed prior wrong IDs for BB/Briarcliff). Instagram @dfeaglesbaseball checked (last post Apr 14). MaxPreps cross-referenced. Key findings: BB 5-2 W5 (Apr 20 league opener vs DF), Briarcliff 4-2-1, Westlake 5-3, Saunders surging 4-2-1 W3, Rye Neck collapsing L3, Edgemont 1-7, Haldane 1-5 L5 (DF plays tomorrow), Ardsley 0-7 winless. All teamIntel now has 2+ sources.

newsLog.text: Loaded full GameChanger season stats (batting, pitching, fielding) for all 15 DF varsity players through 8 games (5-3). Source: GC box score screenshots + season stats pages provided by coach. Corrected Haldane Apr 18 game entries with official box score data. Team batting .304/.416/.800, pitching 3.28 ERA, fielding .883.
Added JV game: Apr 24 @ Pearl River HS, 4:30 PM. Pearl River JV added to JV schedule in updater.
Daily dashboard sweep completed. DF confirmed 5-3 (W2 streak). Today: vs Blind Brook at Gould Park 4:30 PM (first Class B league game). No new DF game results since Apr 18 Haldane W 16-2.

opponentResults.source: Pawling DS / Blind Brook DS cross-ref
Pearl River DS / Ardsley DS cross-ref

Ardsley.blurb: Winless at 0-7. DF beat them 6-3 (Apr 14). Worst team on the schedule. Not a threat to anyone.
Ardsley.intel: Ardsley is 0-3 with losses to Hendrick Hudson 1-5, Hastings 3-4, and Putnam Valley 7-11. Only 3 games played. Limited stats on MaxPreps: J. Jaeger .500 in small sample. Goldberg and Kleinman both 0.00 ERA in limited innings. Up next: vs Tuckahoe (today Apr 21), vs Albertus Magnus (Apr 22).

Blind Brook.blurb: 5-game win streak. DS 5-2 confirmed by MaxPreps. Strong offense (40 RF). Plays Westlake today (Apr 17), at Briarcliff Sat, then at DF Mon (league opener). Key threat.
Blind Brook.intel: Blind Brook is 7-3 overall, 1-0 in Class B league play after beating DF 5-2 on Apr 20. On a 2-game win streak. Strong offense across the board. Hosts Dobbs Ferry today (Apr 22) and Leffell (Apr 23). Up next: vs Dobbs Ferry Apr 22 4:30 PM (league).

Edgemont.blurb: Struggling badly at 1-7. Only win vs Haldane. Lost to Leffell 1-5 on Apr 16. DF already beat them 5-1. Not a threat.
Edgemont.intel: Edgemont is 3-7 but on a 2-game win streak after beating North Salem 16-6 and Irvington 14-4. Lost 7 of first 8. Terrasi hitting .393 with 8 SB. Vargas .500 in limited ABs with 1 HR. Kusinitz 2.45 ERA. Up next: vs Ardsley (Apr 23), at Eastchester (Apr 25).

Haldane.blurb: 1-5 with 5-game losing streak. DF plays at Haldane tomorrow (Apr 18, 11am). Should be a favorable matchup. Only win was 10-0 early season.
Haldane.intel: Haldane is 1-7 after losing 6 straight since their opening day W 11-0 vs Peekskill. Lost to Pawling 9-3 (league) and DF 16-2. Only competitive game was 12-10 loss to Sleepy Hollow. A. Swan hitting .370, Theo Swan .333 with 9 RBI. Herman 3.18 ERA. Up next: at Pawling (Apr 22), vs Putnam Valley (Apr 24).

Hastings.blurb: 3-5 overall but 2-1 in league (beat Blind Brook, lost to Westlake). Social share suggests L 2-11 to Westlake today (Apr 17). Plays at Valhalla Sat, then Tuckahoe (league) Mon.
Hastings.intel: Hastings is 5-5 overall, 2-1 in Class B league play (W at Blind Brook, L at Westlake, W vs Tuckahoe). On a 4-game win streak after rough early season. Plays at Tuckahoe today (Apr 22, league), then at Dobbs Ferry Fri (Apr 24, league). Up next: at Tuckahoe Apr 22 4:30 PM (league).

Irvington.blurb: Split with DF this season (lost 2-6, won 7-1). Non-league. DS page not checked this run (not in 15-team priority list).
Irvington.intel: Irvington is 2-2 with wins over Sleepy Hollow (9-8) and Haldane (13-0) but losses to Blind Brook (8-12) and Edgemont (4-14). Got blown out by Edgemont on Apr 20. Long gap in schedule with next game not until May 4. No player stats entered on MaxPreps. Up next: at Sleepy Hollow (May 4).

Leffell School.blurb: Undefeated at 2-0 but tiny sample. Beat Edgemont 5-1 and had a 21-1 blowout. League play starts Apr 20 vs Rye Neck. Could surprise.
Leffell School.intel: Leffell School not on MaxPreps. Lost to Rye Neck 5-11 (Apr 20, league), lost to Putnam Valley 3-5 (Apr 16), beat Edgemont 5-1 (Apr 15). Up next: at Rye Neck (Apr 22, league).

Pearl River.blurb: Hot at 4-1 with 4-game win streak. Beat DF 11-10 in a close one. Beat Ardsley 10-1. Strong offense. Non-league but quality test opponent.
Pearl River.intel: Pearl River is 1-1 per MaxPreps (likely more games not entered). Beat Edgemont 10-0 but lost to Nyack 7-8. DF beat PR 11-10 on Apr 11 but that game not showing on PR's MaxPreps page. Very limited data available. No player stats entered. Up next: vs Albertus Magnus (Apr 23).

Rye Neck.blurb: Started 3-0, now on 3-game losing skid (3-3). Getting shut out in 2 of last 3 losses. League play at Leffell Apr 20. Concerning slide.
Rye Neck.intel: Rye Neck is 4-5 after beating Leffell 11-5 (league) snapping a 5-game losing streak. Started 3-0 but dropped 5 straight to Pawling, Bronxville, Byram Hills, Valhalla, Pleasantville. R. Sutter .500 AVG, Strzalkowski .400, Gellman .333 with 10H/8RBI. Mandell 3.00 ERA. Up next: vs Leffell (Apr 22), vs Tuckahoe (Apr 24).

Saunders.blurb: Surging at 4-2-1 with 3-game win streak. Destroying Poughkeepsie (14-0, 22-1). DF beat them 7-3 early. Much improved since then. Non-league opponent.
Saunders.intel: Saunders has no MaxPreps page or data available. DF beat Saunders 7-3 on Mar 27. No recent intel. Up next: unknown.

Sleepy Hollow.blurb: 5-4, strong. Beat DF 18-1. Lots of close games. Non-league opponent.
Sleepy Hollow.intel: Sleepy Hollow is 5-5, 3-3 in their league. Beat BOSSJ 13-0 on Apr 20 but lost a close one 10-11 to Woodlands. Won big 18-1 at DF. Alternating wins and losses. No player stats on MaxPreps. Up next: vs BOSSJ (Apr 22), vs Roosevelt (Apr 25).

Tuckahoe.blurb: 2-4 but coming off 18-1 win. Lost to Briarcliff 5-8. League play at Hastings Apr 20. Inconsistent - big wins and big losses. Beatable but dangerous.
Tuckahoe.intel: Tuckahoe is 2-6, 0-1 in league after losing to Hastings 4-6. Only wins: Somers 6-5 and North Salem 18-1. Romeo .333 with 9H/7RBI. Brice .304 with 1 3B. Carney 3.41 ERA leads staff. Up next: at Ardsley (today Apr 21), vs Hastings (Apr 22).

Valhalla.blurb: DS page completely empty. Cross-referencing opponents: lost to Blind Brook 2-3, beat Edgemont 9-6, blew out Rye Neck 14-3. Active and competitive despite empty DS. League at Briarcliff Apr 24.
Valhalla.intel: Valhalla is 2-4 with wins over Edgemont (9-6) and Rye Neck (14-3). Got hammered by Westlake twice (5-17, 3-13) and lost to Hastings 2-11. No player stats on MaxPreps. League play starts Apr 24 vs Briarcliff. Up next: vs Briarcliff (Apr 24, league).
Valhalla.leagueStatus: No Conference 3-D games; Class B playoff only

Westlake.blurb: 5-3 with strong offense. Beat Hastings 11-2. Capable of big wins (17-5, 14-12, 13-3) but also gets blown out. Hastings social share suggests Westlake won 11-2 today too. Non-league opponent for DF.
Westlake.intel: Westlake is 6-4 with quality wins over Hastings (11-2), Valhalla (17-5 and 13-3), and John Jay (14-12). Lost to Tappan Zee 12-1 and Pelham 8-3. Beat Blind Brook 11-6 but lost to Briarcliff 2-1. No player stats on MaxPreps. DF plays Westlake May 11. Up next: at Croton-Harmon (Apr 22).

Briarcliff.blurb: Solid 4-2-1. Tied Brewster. Beat Tuckahoe 8-5 in road win. League starts Apr 20 at Putnam Valley. Has a tie on record. Hosts Blind Brook Sat.
Briarcliff.intel: Briarcliff is 4-4-1 after losing league opener 1-5 to Blind Brook. Beat Westlake 2-1 and Tuckahoe 8-5 but lost to Greeley 2-5 and Pleasantville 3-5. Tied Brewster 5-5. Up next: at Putnam Valley (today Apr 21, league), vs Putnam Valley (Apr 22, league).

Pawling.blurb: 4-3 and competitive. Beat Blind Brook 15-5 early (BB's worst loss). In Briarcliff's league division. Middle of pack.
Pawling.intel: Pawling is 5-1 on a 4-game win streak. Won league opener 9-3 at Haldane. Beat Dover 6-1, Tuckahoe 13-5, and shut out Rye Neck 6-0. Only loss was 2-8 at Rye Neck in game 2. Outscoring opponents 51-22. Up next: vs Haldane (Apr 22, league).

Putnam Valley.blurb: 4-3 overall. Beat Hastings 12-8 but lost 2-12 recently. In Briarcliff's league division. Briarcliff opens league at PV on Apr 20.
Putnam Valley.intel: Putnam Valley is 6-3 with wins over Hastings (12-8), Ardsley (11-7), and Leffell (5-3 league). Lost to Mahopac, Brewster, and Croton-Harmon. Strong pitching depth. No player stats on MaxPreps. Up next: vs Briarcliff (today Apr 21, league).
